name: Mayaman Ram
title: Cybersecurity Enthusiast
bio: Hello! I'm Mayaman Ram, a passionate cybersecurity enthusiast currently pursuing my Bachelor's degree in Cybersecurity. My mission is to protect digital landscapes and make the internet a safer place for everyone.
With expertise in penetration testing, vulnerability assessment, and ethical hacking, I actively contribute to the cybersecurity community through bug bounty programs and open-source security tools.
I believe in continuous learning and staying ahead of emerging threats. My approach combines technical expertise with creative problem-solving to identify and mitigate security vulnerabilities.
